data.title: Coinbase picks major banks JPMorgan, Citi, BoFA to test crypto offerings this year
data.description:
Coinbase started live pilots with some of the largest U. S. banks this week to test stablecoins, custody, and crypto trading, according to comments made Wednesday by CEO Brian Armstrong. The trials began as prices continued a stop‑and‑start slide that has dragged on since October. Brian said the banks taking part see crypto as a working […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/coinbase-major-banks-test-crypto-offerings/

data.title: Strategy Faces Potential MSCI Removal as Bitcoin Exposure Sparks Concern – Here Is What Investors Should Know
data.description:
"Concerns are mounting regarding the potential removal of the investment strategy from the MSCI index due to its significant exposure to Bitcoin. This situation raises important questions for investors, who should be fully informed about the implications and risks associated with the strategy's reliance on cryptocurrencies. Here are the key points that all investors need to consider and understand in light of this development."
source: https://blocknews.com/strategy-faces-potential-msci-removal-as-bitcoin-exposure-sparks-concern-here-is-what-investors-should-know/

data.title: Bitcoin Hovers Near Production Cost as Bull/Bear Line Tightens
data.description:
"Bitcoin is currently trading at a level that is very close to its production cost, suggesting that the market is experiencing significant pressure as the threshold between bullish and bearish sentiment becomes increasingly narrow. This situation indicates a pivotal moment for investors and traders, as the delicate balance between supply and demand is influencing the cryptocurrency's price movements."
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/12/03/bitcoin-hovers-near-production-cost-as-bull-bear-line-tightens

data.title: Tron Hits $80.2B Stablecoin Milestone After Tether Mints 1B USDT On The Network
data.description:
the heldTron has emerged as one of the strongest performers during the latest market downturn, showing a level of resilience rarely seen among major altcoins. While most large-cap cryptocurrencies have suffered drawdowns of 40% or more since August, Tron has limited its losses to just 24%, outperforming nearly the entire altcoin sector. This relative strength highlights the network’s unique positioning and the steady demand it continues to attract despite broader market weakness. Related Reading: Bitcoin Liquidation Dominance Hits Multi-Year High: The Real Cause Behind BTC’s Breakdown A major factor behind this resilience is Tron’s growing dominance in the stablecoin ecosystem
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/tron-trx/tron-hits-80-2b-stablecoin-milestone-after-tether-mints-1b-usdt-on-the-network/

data.title: SEC Blocks 3–5x Leveraged Crypto ETFs in Warning to Issuers – Here Is Why Regulators Hit Pause
data.description:
The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has made the decision to block the approval of 3 to 5 times leveraged cryptocurrency exchange-traded funds (ETFs), issuing a strong warning to the financial issuers of such products. This action has raised significant concerns within the investment community, prompting regulators to hit the brakes on the introduction of these highly speculative investment vehicles. Here, we delve into the reasons behind this regulatory pause, exploring the potential risks involved, the volatile nature of the cryptocurrency market, and the SEC's commitment to protecting investors from products that may carry excessive risk.
source: https://blocknews.com/sec-blocks-3-5x-leveraged-crypto-etfs-in-warning-to-issuers-here-is-why-regulators-hit-pause/

data.title: BNB Surpasses 910 USDT with a 4.15% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Dec 03, 2025, 20:53 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 910 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 910.169983 USDT, with a narrowed 4.15% increase in 24 hours.
